_comment: Bubblewrap input. Pass to: npx -y @bubblewrap/cli init --manifest=https://<your-pwa-host>/manifest.webmanifest. After Bubblewrap initializes, it overwrites this file with full TWA config (signing key path, asset links, etc.). Keep an unsigned copy in version control; keep the generated keystore + passwords OUT of version control.
name: Aethermoor Bus
_sessionNotes: Replace <your-pwa-host> in three places after deploying the PWA.
First Bubblewrap build prompts to create android.keystore. BACK IT UP — losing it locks you out of shipping updates under this packageId.
Add android.keystore + android.keystore.passwords to .gitignore, then commit only this twa-manifest.json.
